use_cases: Toggle boolean settings and preferences in application forms
Enable or disable features with animated visual feedback
Replace checkbox inputs with a more modern toggle interface
Control dark mode, notifications, or other user preferences
Create yes/no decision flows with optional icon indicators
ai_summary: A customizable Radix UI toggle switch component with optional left, right, and thumb icon support, built with motion/react for smooth tap animations. Features controlled and uncontrolled modes, animated thumb movement between states, and accessible focus/disabled states with standard Tailwind styling.
